label_verbatim: (Name of Limited Liability Partnership Allowing Indistinguishable Name)
rationale: Existing LLP's current Maine name (the entity giving consent). Domestic-Maine filing → entity.name (not entity.home_jurisdiction_name).

label_verbatim: FIRST: ...consents to the use of the following indistinguishable name:
rationale: The contested name to which the LLP is consenting (typically the LLP's current name, or a near-variant). Living in name_change.* alongside related keys for a consistent namespace.
Name of the entity requesting permission to use the indistinguishable name.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The entity in possession of the name must change its name to:*
rationale: New, distinguishable name the existing LLP commits to adopting. Footer note says a separate name-change form must accompany this filing.
Date of signature (DATED blank, left side of signature row).

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature of a partner) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Printed name and capacity of the signing partner. Shape D — same convention as MLLC-12/MBCA-11. The wet-ink '*By' signature line itself is not AcroForm-bound.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2 — useful here because the consenting LLP and the requestor often submit a bundled packet (this form + a name-change form for the existing LLP, optionally + the requestor's formation/qualification form).

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

rationale: Total fees enclosed (page-0 fee header reads '$20.00' for this filing; bundled name-change form has its own fee).

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
label_verbatim: Contact email address for this filing

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: Email address to use for annual report reminders
